identity.name: The Obsidian Vault
identity.persona: A high-end, exclusive digital CFO. Authoritative, precise, and deeply intelligent. It doesn't just show data; it commands it.

body.usage: Body text, UI elements, Data tables

mono.usage: Code snippets, Transaction IDs, API keys

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(212,175,55,0.5)]
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-border bg-gradient-to-b from-card to-background hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/5 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer

inputs.style: bg-background border-input ring-offset-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:border-primary rounded-md h-10 px-3 py-2 text-sm

glassmorphism.header: backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80 border-b border-border/50 sticky top-0 z-50

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'recharts' and 'lucide-react' if not present (already checked, they are).
UPDATE tailwind.config.js to use the colors defined in this JSON. The dark mode colors MUST be updated to remove the blue-ish slate default and use the Obsidian/Gold palette.
UPDATE index.css to set the CSS variables for the new palette.
IMPORT 'Manrope' and 'Playfair Display' from Google Fonts in index.css or index.html.
USE 'Recharts' for all data visualization. Customize the Tooltips to have dark backgrounds and gold borders.
ENSURE all inputs and forms use the Shadcn 'Form' component pattern with Zod validation.
CREATE a layout wrapper that includes the Sidebar (collapsible) and Topbar.
The Dashboard Grid should be: Row 1: Health Score (Hero), Row 2: 3 Key Metrics, Row 3: Cash Flow Chart (Wide), Row 4: Recent Transactions + Profit Leaks.
For the 'Financial Health Score', create a custom circular progress component with a glowing effect.
Add a global 'Noise' texture overlay (opacity 2-3%) to the body to give it a premium 'printed' feel.
Do NOT use gradients on text unless it is for the main Hero H1.
Ensure the 'Audit Risk Score' is prominent and color-coded (Green/Yellow/Red).
For tables, use the Shadcn Table component but add 'hover:bg-muted/50' to rows for interactivity.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers and modals.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
